metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for generating Adobe-branded PowerPoint presentations following Adobe Creative Cloud Brand Guidelines (January 2025).

plugins.name: adobe-ppt-generation
plugins.description: End-to-end wizard for creating fully brand-compliant Adobe .pptx presentations using python-pptx. Enforces Adobe Red/Black/White palette, Adobe Clean typography, logo placement, and runs a 20-point brand compliance check.
